lyrics.text: Love is enough for me
lyrics.translation: 拥有爱情对我来说就足够了

lyrics.text: Paper planes will make you see
lyrics.translation: 纸飞机会让你看到的

lyrics.text: Simplicity
lyrics.translation: 最质朴的感情

lyrics.text: We kinda rock this bar
lyrics.translation: 咱们要让这个酒吧热闹起来

lyrics.text: You look like a superstar
lyrics.translation: 你就像巨星

lyrics.text: I wanna show you things I love about you
lyrics.translation: 我想告诉你 我爱你的原因

lyrics.text: Holding hands and feeling so cool
lyrics.translation: 抓住你的手 感觉有些冰凉

lyrics.text: All the things I love about you or
lyrics.translation: 爱你的原因 又或者是吻你

lyrics.text: Sharing lips and kiss anytime
lyrics.translation: 随时随刻接吻

lyrics.text: You're so nice to make me feel right
lyrics.translation: 你如此美好 令我为你心动

lyrics.text: Giving looks and dancing all night
lyrics.translation: 双眼望着你 彻夜狂欢起舞

lyrics.text: We are the superstars, super, super, superstars
lyrics.translation: 我们是巨星

lyrics.text: Yeah, we the ones, who have the power
lyrics.translation: Yeah 我们就是有权有势

lyrics.text: Where you are or where you go
lyrics.translation: 跑向你的身边 跑向你要去的地方

lyrics.text: Don't running no
lyrics.translation: 你别逃离

lyrics.text: If love can make you mine
lyrics.translation: 如果爱能让你成为我的爱人

lyrics.text: Deepest thoughts can come alive
